emails.subject: Re: Opportunities at ENA
emails.body: He and I are meeting this week to discuss opportunities. I'll keep you posted. Michelle From: Mark E Haedicke on 12/04/2000 04:52 PM

emails.subject: Re: Opportunities at ENA
emails.body: He and I are meeting this week to discuss opportunities. I'll keep you posted. Michelle From: Mark E Haedicke on 12/04/2000 04:52 PM

emails.subject: Re: Opportunities at ENA
emails.body: Mark, as an update, I am meeting with Carlos tomorrow. He will interview with a number of folks next week, including Sheila, Barbara, Alan, and Dan (all of whom expressed an interest in talking with him about working in their groups). Assuming all goes well, I'll schedule a meeting with you after that. Michelle From: Mark E Haedicke on 12/04/2000 04:52 PM
